name: create
description: Create a new scheduled task. Grok will execute the prompt on the specified schedule and optionally notify the user. Use this when the user asks to create a reminder, scheduled task, or recurring check.

prompt.description: The prompt Grok will execute on each run

cadence.description: RFC 5545 RRULE describing how often the task runs (e.g. "RRULE:FREQ=DAILY", "RRULE:FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO", "RRULE:FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,TU,WE,TH,FR" for weekdays, "RRULE:FREQ=MONTHLY;BYMONTHDAY=15", "RRULE:FREQ=YEARLY"). Omit / empty to run only once. Do not include DTSTART/DTEND — use time_of_day + timezone instead.

scheduled_date.description: ISO 8601 date for one-time tasks (e.g. '2026-05-25'). Required when cadence is omitted (run-once). Defaults to today if not provided.

timezone.description: IANA timezone (e.g. 'America/New_York'). Defaults to user's timezone.
